title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at OYO Rooms - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at OYO Rooms - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
OYO Rooms invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Digital Marketing Manager at our Bhopal location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About OYO Rooms:
OYO Rooms is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Referral bonus program
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with OYO Rooms!
